title: Huntingtower
author: John Buchan
description: Huntingtower is a 1922 novel by the Scottish author John Buchan, initially serialised in The Popular Magazine between August 20 and September 7 1921 and in The London Magazine between December 1921 and July 1922. It is the first of his three Dickson McCunn books, the action taking place in the district of Carrick in Galloway, Scotland.
